ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation and Details
ham.body:
Dear Mr. John Doe,

Thank you for booking your flight with us. Below are the details of your upcoming trip:

• Flight: DL 678
• Departure: New York (JFK) – 08:45 AM, 15 June 2026
• Arrival: London (LHR) – 08:15 PM, 15 June 2026
• Gate: 24B
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Baggage: 1 checked bag (up to 23 kg) and 1 carry‑on

Please arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before departure.

If you have any questions or need to make changes, reply to this email or call our customer support.

Safe travels!

Sincerely,

Travel Services Team
Customer Support
+1-800-555-1234

spam.subject: Urgent: Outstanding Delivery Fee – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our records indicate that your recent shipment with FedEx (Tracking # 999999999999) was not delivered due to an outstanding delivery fee. To avoid further delays and potential account suspension, please complete the payment within the next 48 hours.

You can securely pay the fee by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to settle the fee will result in your account being temporarily suspended and future shipments being delayed.

If you believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

FedEx Customer Support
+1-800-555-9876
